reason_for_decision: The article passes because it reframes range selection around useful coverage geometry, blind zones, and decision distance instead of headline maximum range.
strengths: The article is strong on minimum range and near-field gaps, which are often missed in simplistic range comparisons.
It makes outer-layer versus inner-layer range planning easy to understand for project teams.
The selection questions at the end convert a vague product comparison into an architectural planning exercise.
summary_assessment: This is a solid pass. It is practical, balanced, and particularly good at translating radar range classes into real deployment choices.
